title: Nutty Crispy Croatian Sea Bass Stir-fry
description: A sick-day-friendly dish featuring crispy sea bass coated in a nut-free topping of toasted almonds and mixed seeds.

ingredients.name: Pumpkin Seeds
ingredients.notes: Roasted and salted, optional for extra crunch

instructions: Toast almonds in the oven for about 8 minutes or until golden brown and fragrant.
Toast pumpkin seeds in a dry pan over medium heat for about 2-3 minutes, shaking frequently until they're crunchy but not burnt. Season with salt if desired.
Mix toasted almonds and pumpkin seeds together in a bowl.
Season sea bass fillets on both sides with salt and pepper.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over high heat. Add garlic and sauté for about 30 seconds until fragrant but not browned.
Place sea bass fillets skin-side down into the hot pan. Cook for 2-3 minutes, then flip and cook another 1-2 minutes or until just cooked through (fillets should be opaque but still moist).
Arrange cooked fish on a plate, topped with a generous scoop of the toasted nut mixture.
Garnish with sliced green onions if desired.
